subcodes.first_line: O Rida! Bear thou witness within thine inmost self and being, with the tongue which God hath deposited within thee, that verily there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا فاشهد فی نفسک و ذاتک بلسان الذی اودعه الله فیک بانه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
